scripts-descriptions.check-di: Compile the DI container in isolation so a broken service definition fails here instead of in production
scripts-descriptions.version: Bump the project version (patch|minor|major|x.y.z, or no argument for an interactive menu)
scripts-descriptions.interface: Auto-import results from connected analyzer / middleware databases
scripts-descriptions.provision: Create the runtime directories the app writes to and fix their ownership and permissions
scripts-descriptions.clear-logs: Remove generated log files from var/logs (--keep=N and/or --days=N to retain recent ones)
scripts-descriptions.audit-triggers-drop: Drop all audit triggers (triggers only; no table or row data is touched)
scripts-descriptions.audit-triggers-install: Install or regenerate the audit triggers that record form_* changes into audit_log
scripts-descriptions.token: Generate or refresh the STS API auth token (no-op on non-LIS instances)
scripts-descriptions.db:repair: Reinstall audit triggers and recalculate sequence counters from actual table data
scripts-descriptions.install-hooks: Symlink the repo git hooks into .git/hooks (run once per clone; no-op on tarball deploys)
scripts-descriptions.refresh: Rebase onto the latest origin default branch, reinstall dependencies and run post-update
scripts-descriptions.post-install: Tasks to run after InteLIS install
scripts-descriptions.post-update: Tasks to run after InteLIS update
scripts-descriptions.sync-sts: Sync data with a connected STS server
scripts-descriptions.pending-commands: Pick up and dispatch remote commands queued at STS (gated behind global_config.remote_commands_enabled)
scripts-descriptions.backup-key: Generate and save this instance's backup encryption key to the STS for recovery (gated behind global_config.backup_key_recovery_enabled)
scripts-descriptions.backup-key-admin: STS admin tool: approve a backup key release (mint a one-time recovery token) or print the offline recovery code for a lab
scripts-descriptions.sts-setup: Setup connection with a STS server
scripts-descriptions.setup-sts: Setup connection with a STS server
scripts-descriptions.db:collation: Ensure database tables use correct collation
scripts-descriptions.system-admin: Create or update system administrator account
scripts-descriptions.dev:switch-mode: Switch this dev instance between LIS and STS mode (e.g. composer dev:switch-mode lis|sts)
scripts-descriptions.reset-metadata: Reset STS metadata to force full sync
scripts-descriptions.metadata-sync: Sync metadata with connected STS server
scripts-descriptions.send-results: Send test results to connected STS server
scripts-descriptions.receive-requests: Receive test requests from connected STS server
scripts-descriptions.generate-translation-strings: Generate translation strings from source code
scripts-descriptions.lock-samples: Lock sample records that have been completed
scripts-descriptions.housekeeping: Housekeeping — remove old backups, temporary files, logs, and stale DB rows
scripts-descriptions.archive-audit-tables: Archive audit tables to reduce database size
